sql_array: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR, password_hash VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO users (id, username, password_hash) VALUES (1, 'user1', md5('password123'));
UPDATE users SET password_hash = md5('newpassword456') WHERE username = 'user1';
SELECT username, md5(username) AS username_hash FROM users;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE password_hash = md5('password123');
